title: A Mother's Voice
summary: A warm voice whispers that everything will be alright before fading into darkness.
fragment: You hear someone laugh... warm... familiar. A woman's voice tells you to come home before dinner gets cold. The memory slips away before you can see her face.
reveals: The original recruit had a family.
dmNotes: This should feel comforting, not suspicious.

title: The Marketplace
summary: A faint memory of laughing with Nella in the market.
fragment: Nella runs past carrying a loaf of kelp bread, laughing as someone chases her. You remember smiling... although you know that memory isn't yours.
reveals: The original recruits knew Atlantis personally.

title: They'll Blame the Surface
fragment: "It doesn't matter what actually happened... they'll blame the Surface. They always do."

title: Do Not Open the Vault
summary: A warning connected to the beacon.
fragment: "Whatever happens... don't let them open the lower vault."
reveals: The beacon is older than Atlantis admits.

title: Someone Knew
fragment: "How did they know we'd be here...? Only command knew this route..."
reveals: There is an information leak inside Atlantis.

title: You Were Never Supposed to Survive
summary: The body swap wasn't an accident.
fragment: "The transfer failed... wait... no... they're alive... that's impossible..."

title: Project Tidefall
summary: The first mention of Project Tidefall.
fragment: "Project Tidefall proceeds ahead of schedule. Subject compatibility exceeds expectations."

title: Authorized by Order of the Crown
reveals: Someone within the government approved Project Tidefall.

title: Meet Me Beneath the City
summary: The campaign hook into Act II.
fragment:
A small spiral is carved into the note.

"Meet me beneath the city before they erase you too."
reveals: The Free Current Network has made contact.
